sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5058" key="a)mblw/skw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμβλ-ώσκω</orth>, <sense id="n5058.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀμβλίσκω</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg002:1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
